<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Gif\Blocks; use Intervention\Gif\AbstractEntity; class Color extends AbstractEntity { /** * Create new instance */ public function __construct( protected int $r = 0, protected int $g = 0, protected int $b = 0 ) { // } /** * Get red value */ public function getRed(): int { return $this->r; } /** * Set red value */ public function setRed(int $value): self { $this->r = $value; return $this; } /** * Get green value */ public function getGreen(): int { return $this->g; } /** * Set green value */ public function setGreen(int $value): self { $this->g = $value; return $this; } /** * Get blue value */ public function getBlue(): int { return $this->b; } /** * Set blue value */ public function setBlue(int $value): self { $this->b = $value; return $this; } /** * Return hash value of current color */ public function getHash(): string { return md5($this->r . $this->g . $this->b); } }
